name: The Prototype - Poppy Playtime
description:
In an hour of joy, the prototype found you.

~~~

Now you are his toy out of boredom.

While listening to Insane Clown Posse's songs, I suddenly thought, why don't I write a story like "Play with me"?

Enjoy! ໒꒰ྀི ˶• ༝ •˶ ྀི১

I made a new bot - Prototype and Harley Sawyer simultaneously.
creator: qp_lalqvr
